---
title: "How four bits become a kolam"
description: "This article has moved to the Writing section."
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-legacy-note}
<p class="mn-kicker">NEW HOME</p>

## This article now lives under Writing

The permanent article and all future mathematical exposition are collected in the new Writing section.

[Continue to “How four bits become a kolam”](../../../writing/articles/binary-kolam-tiles/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
